tags.description: Kayaks alone can travel against swift current (3 to 5 MPH at normal stage). Very long trip, over7 miles. Start early, bring food, and arrange return trip.  Red cliffs, sandbars, giant trees, & swimming in surprisingly cool, refreshing wasters.
